title: Phase 2 tests: tools — file operations [CC parity]
description:
## Goal

Implement Rust tests covering the behavioral spec produced by Phase 1 (#525). Pin down every contract listed in that spec with at least one test case.

Parent audit: #523.

## Blocked on

- Phase 1 spec issue #525. Do not start until that body contains the markdown spec.

## Where the tests live

- `src/tools/file/read.rs` — `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` for offset/limit, image base64, truncation
- `src/tools/file/edit.rs` — tests for missing old_string error, replace_all
- `src/tools/file/write.rs` — tests for parent-dir create
- `src/tools/file/notebook.rs` — tests for cell_id + cell_number fallback
- `tests/file_tools_integration.rs` (new) — cross-tool flow (write → read → edit → read)

## Test plan skeleton

- Read the spec at #525.
- For each behavior bullet: add a `#[test]` (or `#[tokio::test]`) named after the behavior.
- For pure functions: `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` colocated in the same source file.
- For multi-module / cross-process / SSE / HTTP: `tests/<subsystem>_integration.rs`.
- Use `tempfile::TempDir` for filesystem isolation.
- Use `wiremock` (already in deps) for HTTP fakes; avoid network IO.
- Property tests (`proptest`) for input-parsers where useful.

## Notes
- Use `tempfile::TempDir::new()` to scope all file operations
- Image fixtures: generate a tiny 1x1 PNG inline (`image` crate already available) — do not commit binary fixtures

## Acceptance

- Every Phase 1 behavior bullet has at least one matching test
- `cargo test -p openclaudia` passes cleanly (no `#[ignore]` shortcuts)
- `cargo test --workspace -- --nocapture` shows the new tests by name
- No new clippy warnings (`cargo clippy --tests -- -D warnings`)
- Gap signals from Phase 1 confirmed filed as separate feature issues, not silently bundled here
